category.scope_note: Portable lithium battery cells, battery packs, and power banks (China export to Egypt) compliance gap comparison.

title.en: China-to-Egypt Lithium Battery & Power Bank Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国锂电池/移动电源进入埃及：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國鋰電池/行動電源進入埃及：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China lithium battery and power bank documentation against Egyptian requirements: EOS (ES) safety standards adopting IEC 62133, GOEIC importer and factory registration under Decree 43/2016, NTRA radio approval for wireless features, UN 38.3 transport, and an in-country importer of record.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国锂电池/移动电源合规文件与埃及要求对照：EOS（ES）采纳IEC 62133的安全标准、GOEIC依据第43/2016号法令的进口商与工厂注册、NTRA对无线功能的电信批准、UN 38.3运输，以及埃及境内的进口报关主体。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國鋰電池/行動電源合規文件與埃及要求對照：EOS（ES）採納IEC 62133的安全標準、GOEIC依據第43/2016號法令的進口商與工廠登記、NTRA對無線功能的電信批准、UN 38.3運輸，以及埃及境內的進口報關主體。

disclaimer.en: For informational purposes only. Not legal advice. Regulations change; verify all requirements with qualified legal and technical advisors before export. This page does not constitute a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment result, customs determination, or market-access approval.
disclaimer.zh: 仅供参考，不构成法律意见。法规随时变化，出口前请向具备资质的法律及技术顾问核实所有要求。本页不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定结果、海关裁定或市场准入批准。
disclaimer.zht: 僅供參考，不構成法律意見。法規隨時變化，出口前請向具備資質的法律及技術顧問核實所有要求。本頁不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定結果、海關裁定或市場准入批准。

answer_first.en: Chinese lithium battery and power bank exporters to Egypt must meet EOS (ES) safety standards that adopt IEC 62133, register the importer and factory with GOEIC under Decree 43/2016, obtain NTRA approval for any wireless feature, and ship under UN 38.3 with an in-country importer of record — none of which are satisfied by Chinese GB 31241 or CCC certification alone.
answer_first.zh: 中国锂电池及移动电源出口至埃及，须满足EOS（ES）采纳IEC 62133的安全标准、依据第43/2016号法令在GOEIC完成进口商及工厂注册、就任何无线功能取得NTRA批准，并依UN 38.3运输且具备埃及境内进口报关主体——上述要求均无法仅凭中国GB 31241或CCC认证替代。
answer_first.zht: 中國鋰電池及行動電源出口至埃及，須滿足EOS（ES）採納IEC 62133的安全標準、依據第43/2016號法令在GOEIC完成進口商及工廠登記、就任何無線功能取得NTRA批准，並依UN 38.3運輸且具備埃及境內進口報關主體——上述要求均無法僅憑中國GB 31241或CCC認證替代。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be true.
